units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for beginning any hands-on development work.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, as they represent database records for manipulation.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit directly addresses hands-on Apex by teaching how to perform DML operations to create, update, and delete records.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Learning to write SOQL queries is a core hands-on Apex skill for retrieving specific data from the Salesforce database.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit teaches hands-on SOSL querying, providing another essential method for searching data within Apex applications.
